metadata.description: Bootstrap baseline of acknowledged-unverified line/Zeile references captured when the label-inventory test was first added. Each fingerprint represents one user-facing line reference (e.g., "Form 1040 line 17", "Anlage N Zeile 6") that has not yet been authoritatively verified against ELSTER / IRS / BMF source documents. Closing this baseline is a New-2 follow-on: replace each fingerprint with either (a) an ELSTER-VERIFIED / IRS-VERIFIED / BMF-VERIFIED marker within 3 lines of the matched string, (b) a NEEDS-VERIFICATION marker if the source could not be authoritatively located, or (c) a move into tax_pipeline/forms/schemas/<form_id>.toml so Y2/P5 + I3 protects the label.
metadata.rationale: Per proposal New-2: "Loud at first (every existing string needs marking). After the bootstrap, the test only fires for new unmarked strings." The baseline is the explicit, reviewable record of every label in this codebase that has not yet been verified.
metadata.posture: Phase A — baseline acknowledged. Phase B (future) requires this list to be empty.
metadata.audit_refinement_2026_05_10: Refinement during New-2 verification audit: schema-covered classification was tightened to require the matched regex hit to coincide with the suffix of a declared schema label (not just any substring overlap). This moved 116 hits from schema-covered to unverified — they are now in this honest baseline. The two previously-baselined-but-now-stale fingerprints are removed.
metadata.audit_refinement_2026_05_10_schedule_2: 2026-05-10 (Schedule 2 2025 line-numbering fix): removed 54 stale fingerprints whose underlying string was either edited (renderer / notes / form-6251 caption updates), reclassified as VERIFIED via new IRS-VERIFIED 2026-05-10 markers citing https://www.irs.gov/pub/irs-pdf/f1040s2.pdf, or moved into the schedule_2 form-schema TOML. Closes the New-2 verified-and-shrink cycle for the Schedule 2 (2025) Part I AMT line-numbering defect.
metadata.audit_refinement_2026_05_04_w2_box: 2026-05-04 (slice W1.D / T3.1): added regex pattern `w2_or_1099_box` to catch W-2 / 1099 "Box N" references (coverage gap surfaced by the New-2 verifier — pattern was missing entirely, so user-facing strings like `W-2 box 3` at tax_pipeline/forms/usa.py:1365 and `1099-DIV box 2a` in tax_pipeline/narrative/templates/US25-02-INCOME-SIDE-INPUTS.jinja were not in the inventory). The new pattern surfaced 34 hits across forms/usa.py, providers/schwab/, y2025/derivation/, y2025/us_rules.py, fact_extraction.py, and the US25-02 / US25-03 / US25-04 narrative templates. All 34 are added to this baseline as acknowledged-unverified pending separate verification slices.
metadata.audit_refinement_2026_05_11_schedule_2_c: 2026-05-11 (Schedule 2 chain consistency audit, slice W2.D / T3.4): removed 9 stale fingerprints from forms/usa.py whose underlying lines were edited beyond recognition during the _write_schedule_2 docstring + FileNotFoundError-message audit (chain Form 6251 line 11 -> Schedule 2 line 2 -> Schedule 2 line 3 -> Form 1040 line 17, IRS-VERIFIED 2026-05-11 against https://www.irs.gov/pub/irs-pdf/f1040s2.pdf). The updated docstring cites the chain inside the proximity window so the hit is classified as verified rather than re-baselined.

2026-05-11 (Schedule 2 chain consistency audit, slice W2.D / T3.4 commit 2/3): removed 30 more stale fingerprints from us_rules.py / us_stages.py / pipelines/y2025/jurisdictions/usa_final.py whose underlying comment lines were rewritten to correct the 2024 Schedule 2 line-1 prose to 2025 line-2 and to expand the chain (Form 6251 line 11 -> Schedule 2 line 2 -> Schedule 2 line 3 (= line 1z + line 2) -> Form 1040 line 17). IRS-VERIFIED 2026-05-11 markers were added in-proximity per https://www.irs.gov/pub/irs-pdf/f1040s2.pdf.
metadata.audit_refinement_2026_05_11_w3b_t13_batc: 2026-05-11 (slice W3.B / T1.3 batch 1/4 — forms/usa.py): added 9 IRS-VERIFIED 2026-05-11 markers and 1 IRS-NEEDS-VERIFICATION 2026-05-11 marker, citing the 2025 IRS PDFs for Form 1040 (f1040.pdf), Schedule B (f1040sb.pdf), Schedule SE (f1040sse.pdf), Schedule 2 (f1040s2.pdf), Schedule 3 (f1040s3.pdf), Form 8959 (f8959.pdf), Form 8960 (f8960.pdf), and Form 1116 (f1116.pdf). NEEDS-VERIFICATION flag covers the long-standing 'Form 1116 line 33' references in forms/usa.py (also present in treaty_stages.py, us_rules.py, us_stages.py) where the 2025 Form 1116 PDF puts the FTC-carry-to-Schedule-3-line-1 row at a different Part IV row than the cited number; flagged for a separate atomic line-numbering commit (mirrors the 2026-05-09 Anlage SO + 2026-05-10 Schedule 2 surgical-fix pattern).
metadata.audit_refinement_2026_05_11_germany_anla: 2026-05-11 (slice W3.B / T1.3 partial): forms/germany.py docstrings for _write_anlage_kind and _write_anlage_vorsorgeaufwand received BMF-VERIFIED 2026-05-11 markers citing § 33b Abs. 5 EStG and § 10 EStG. 9 fingerprints removed (baselined stale after the marker-driven docstring edits). Web-verification cites https://www.gesetze-im-internet.de/estg/__33b.html and https://www.gesetze-im-internet.de/estg/__10.html.

changelog.change: W3.B batch 3 (4 of 9 narrative templates VERIFIED): removed 28 stale fingerprints covered by IRS-VERIFIED / BMF-VERIFIED markers in US25-02-INCOME-SIDE-INPUTS.jinja, US25-07-AGI.jinja, US25-21-PAYMENTS.jinja, DE25-CHILDREN-DISABILITY-PAUSCHBETRAG.jinja.

W4 / KAP-JStG-2024: removed 25 stale fingerprints across DE25-FORM-KAP-PROJECTION.jinja, germany_kap_projection_rules.py, and germany_stages.py after JStG 2024 deletion of former 2024 Anlage KAP per-bucket lines (Termingeschäfte gains/losses, Uneinbringlichkeit). BMF-VERIFIED markers added in-proximity citing BMF 16.05.2025 Steuerbescheinigung-Schreiben (https://www.bundesfinanzministerium.de/Content/DE/Downloads/BMF_Schreiben/Steuerarten/Abgeltungsteuer/2025-05-16-kapitalertragSt-steuerbescheinigung.pdf) and post-JStG-2024 § 20 Abs. 6 EStG (https://www.gesetze-im-internet.de/estg/__20.html).
